feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single period
entry.content:
Hi,

For my customer I need to change the valuation class for a set of materials. Something has changed since I've done this a couple of years ago.

In the material master I now see several periods that have a valuation class field that can be changed. One on every tab for current period (6), previous period (5) and last period of previous fiscal year (12/2024)

The SAP help text still states to clear all stocks for current and previous period and mark the open PO's (and STO's) with a deletion indicator before you can make any changes.

I found out that if I delete the PO items and clear the stock for this period only I can change the valuation class of period 6. Because I did not clear the stock in period 5 it still gives me the error message and shows it has stock there.

Question to you all is: If I clear the stock for period 6, change the valuation class and put back the stock, what will happen when we go to period 7? Will SAP use the valuation class of period 6 as the new valuation class for period 7?

entry.title: S/4 Shell Conversion with IBP - Material Types
entry.content:
Hi All

I currently work for a company that have all materials (including finished goods) set to HAWA.  They are looking to do a shell conversion from ECC to S/4 with only mandatory changes needed.  SAP IBP is going to follow after we are live.

I'm trying to build a case where we should look to standardise some data as we convert and this is top of my list.  Having never seen this setup before does anyone have any experience of this and the problems we might face especially when trying to implement IBP, PLM, MDG etc. afterwards

Thanks 

Andy

entry.title: Report for Custom MIRO
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly let me know if there is any Standard report for CUSTOM MIRO in s/4 HANA?
Please help with the steps..

entry.title: Authorization for repl. model &1 and outbound implementation &2 missing.
entry.content:
When  i try to release an order for a material (Sending to another system via data replication), i sometimes see an error in SM58:
Authorization for repl. model &1 and outbound implementation &2 missing.

This error doesn’t always appear ( the same data, is using) and when i debug it in SM58, the entry processes successfully without showing anything unusual.

Could anyone help me find what causes this issue, and how can I fix it.  

Thanks

entry.title: Wrong Movement Type for Warehouse in Mobile data Entry
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are transferring the stock from the Warehouse managed SLOC to Non-Warehouse managed SLOC, Therefore we have done the transfer posting-311. With the reference of TR number created in transfer posting TO is created. To confirm the TO in RFUI ( Mobile data Entry ) It is showing an Error as " Wrong Movement type for Warehouse XXX ".
kindly suggest if any configuration to be done.

 


Thanks,
Saikumar.

entry.title: Need some clarification or suggestions regarding T-Code MD07 output
entry.content:
Hi folks,

i need some clarification/suggestions from you regarding T-Code MD07 output.

While checking Output of the MD07 T-code by MRP Controller wise it gives the outputs (screenshots below for reference)

MRP Controller-01 = 2 Material

MRP Controller-02 = 219 Material

but checking with over all plant level without giving any MRP Controller information it shows very limited data (screenshots below for reference).

Overall Plant level without specifying MRP Controller = 8 Materials only

i need all MRP Controllers material details by giving Plant alone in MD07 tcode.

(Example : Only giving as Plant input, Plant contains total two MRP Cntlr --> MRP Cntlr 01 + MRP Cntlr 02 = 2 + 219 = 221 materials )

Is it possible to get this total Output from MD07 T-Code or from any other Standard T-Code ??

kindly give your inputs on this. 

Thanks in advance, 

Regards

Aravind

entry.title: We need a solution for product Catalog attributes
entry.content:
Dear Sir 

We need a solution for product Catalog attributes 

business needs

requirement Extend the following attributes in the Material Master Data Such as Model with No Color
1-Generic KeywordColor
2-HD IMG
3-Installation Type
4-Status
5-Gross Unit Dimensions
6-Unit Dimensions
7-Energy Star
8-Country of Origin
9-Life span
10-Life Span Description
11-Warranty
12-Warranty Description

Thanks

entry.title: Assistance Required for Enhancing ME5A Report
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are currently facing a requirement related to the ME5A report that needs your expert guidance. The details are as follows:

Requirement Overview:

  • We need the ME5A report, which typically shows purchase requisitions, to be updated such that if a purchase requisition exists for a material, the report should also display the header material (finished product).
  • The purchase requisitions should be shown as sales order-specific and collective.
  • In the MD04 transaction, when we open the order report, purchase requisitions are displayed, and at a higher level, subassemblies are shown with their corresponding finished products.
  • We need these finished product numbers to be included in the ME5A report.

Request for Guidance:

Please suggest how we can achieve this enhancement. Specifically:

  • Are there any relevant function modules (FMs) or BAPIs that can be used for this purpose?
  • Can you advise on the linkage between the necessary tables, such as EBAN (Purchase Requisition), MARA (Material Master), VBAK (Sales Order Header), and STPO (BOM Items)?

Your expertise on how to approach this task or any pointers to documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support and assistance

entry.title: Forward Shipment Cost Items Incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing error in VI01 t code, where the freight charges in condition type is working properly, but the delivery tab is no coming and while selecting transfer error is arising "Forward Shipment Cost Items Incorrect".

Please help in this issue. 

Screenshots attached for your reference.

entry.title: Held purchase requisitions need to be seen throug trx. MD04
entry.content:
The customer we are working with at the moment states that, in transaction MD04, they used to be able to see and account for held Purchase Requisitions before a recent upgrade to EhP7. They now want this functionality to be available again.

We believe they might have had a Z development, but at the same time, they want to work in the most standard way possible.

 

Is there a standard way to make held PRs available in transaction MD04?

 

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: VA00 price condtion didn't show 2 items althought choose 2 characters
entry.content:
Hi Gays

I was confused with the variant price showing up in SO, although I chose 2 variants in SO, VA00 variant price had been maintained in VK11, but in SO, only shows the first variant's value in conditions sheet. 

there are two characters: 1. bread,  2. sauce.  check-in  "condition"  button, only show 1  and price VA00 ONLY show 1 for bread value in "condition" sheet. 

why?  I suppose it will show 2 value.

Would you please help me? is this issue a system issue?  What can I do?

Thanks a lot!

Grace

entry.title: /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE in Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are getting dump, ASSERTION_FAILED when confirming Warehouse tasks. This is in our Test system but we also received it in our Customizing system.

I have found the same issue in on-prem/private cloud through OSS notes to run SE38 /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE. Unfortunately, this doesn't seem available in Public. 

The specific line of code failing seems to be related to weight. We have not adjusted weight since initial upload.

IF ls_capa-weight IS NOT INITIAL.
ASSERT <dlagp>-unit_w = ls_capa-unit_w.

 

Has anyone faced this issue?

entry.title: vl move
entry.content:
hi all

what" s deficit of batch  please!

 thanks

entry.title: BOM recursive error
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was creating a new BOM, header is A and B is a component, and I faced error message 'BOM is recursive".

Material A and B both do not have BOM in my plant now.

As I checked, other plant has a BOM, B is header and A is component.

Can other plant's BOM affect the process to make BOM for my plant, like this?

If yes, recursice allowed checking is only way to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Error in PGR via Inbound Delivery in S4 HANA for InterCompany Advance STO Process
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am encountering an issue while performing Post Goods Receipt (PGR) via inbound delivery using transaction VL32N in the InterCompany Advanced Stock Transport Order (STO) process in S4 HANA. The error message I receive is:

"No goods receipt possible for purchasing document 4500001039 10" (Message No. M7036).

Attached are the screenshots of the error for your reference. Could you please assist me in resolving this?

Thank you

Regards

Nirjhar

entry.title: Return the Stock in WM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are doing the Initial stock entry with 561 Mvt type with reference of TR number Putaway is done to the destination bin ( 123-storage type) and further we are doing the internal transfer from 123 to 456 storage type.

Requirement is customer wants to return the stock from 456 storage type.
Kindly suggest the Solution and supporting the BAPI for the solution.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Detect MRP situation app, I cant add new exception scenario apart from CAN and EXC.
entry.content:
While getting the report from the Batch Job run through app - Detect MRP Situations, I cannot add new exception messages apart from CAN ( Cancel process) and EXC (Excess stock).

I looked at creating custom situation handling, but there is no available situation type or situation object related to MRP situations.

Can anyone help to understand if it is possible to create custom handling situation for additional exception messages apart from the standard one SAP provides?

entry.title: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (SMQS)
entry.content:
Hi guys,

we are a few days before the start of operations at the customer plant and we are encountering the problem that PPF actions are not always processed correctly. When the GI is posted in EWM, a PPF message is created, sometimes it passes it well (message processed and GI is posted in ERP), sometimes it gets stuck on SPPFP as a yellow mark and by manual execution it makes a statement as Time timit exceeded

In trsc SMQS it looks like this:

Target NONE should not be empty, but it is not:

We are encountering this problem on the quality system, I assume it came from many actions being run in a short period of time, but how is it possible that some of them are works and some are not? I also changed the "Max. Conn" value in SMQS for the target time from 10 to 12, but it had no effect...

I am are grateful for your advices

entry.title: STO creation with Quality/Blocked stock type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to allow intra/intercompany stock transfer from quality stock type. I understand this feature is available in SPM as described in KBA-3390111 but , I came accross another consulting note -3390689 in which it is mentioned that this process will work without errors only of the stock in quality stock type is not linked to an inspection lot for non EWM managed storage location.

My client belong to F&B industry and there it is quite common to have stock moved with the SC network in quality stock type for below reasons:-
1. Quality results usually take time and for that period the stock cannot be stored in factory due to space constraints.

2. in the DC to stock will in quality stock type which ensures this stock is not delivered to customer also stock in quality stock type is considered as available in stock for Supply planning purpose. 

Have you encountered such requirement from your clients and if yes, how have you addressed them.

 

Thanks,

Vinit.

entry.title: Hi,I am facing an error which is in document- Error in Production document; BKPFF $ PNRCLNT100
entry.content:
We are trying to clear out this changer fund balance on a customer account, but we are receiving the error: BKPFF $ PNRCLNT100

Please suggest.
